title: crataegus azarolus var. sinaica
intro: Crataegus azarolus var. sinaica, also known as the Sinaica hawthorn, is a specific variety of the Crataegus azarolus plant, a type of hawthorn tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Crataegus azarolus var. sinaica lie in its fruit, which is rich in flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have a positive effect on cardiovascular health. The health benefits of using Crataegus azarolus var. sinaica include lowering blood pressure, improving heart function, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart health. The herbal preparations of Crataegus azarolus var. sinaica typically involve consuming the dried fruit in capsule or tea form, often combined with other herbs or used as a solo supplement to support cardiovascular well-being.
